G5475.derivation: perhaps from G5465 (χαλάω) through the idea of hollowing out as a vessel (this metal being chiefly used for that purpose);
G5475.strongs_def: copper (the substance, or some implement or coin made of it)

G5431.strongs_def: to exercise thought, i.e. be anxious

G5455.strongs_def: to emit a sound (animal, human or instrumental); by implication, to address in words or by name, also in imitation

G5458.strongs_def: an illuminator, i.e. (concretely) a luminary, or (abstractly) brilliancy

G5413.strongs_def: an invoice (as part of freight), i.e. (figuratively) a task or service

G5488.strongs_def: Charrhan (i.e. Charan), a place in Mesopotamia

G5435.strongs_def: Phrygia, a region of Asia Minor

G5414.strongs_def: something carried, i.e. the cargo of a ship

G5402.strongs_def: probably akin to the base of G5457 (φῶς)); Phœbe, a Christian woman

G5495.derivation: perhaps from the base of G5494 (χειμών) in the sense of its congener the base of G5490 (χάσμα) (through the idea of hollowness for grasping);
G5495.strongs_def: the hand (literally or figuratively (power); especially (by Hebraism) a means or instrument)

G5426.strongs_def: to exercise the mind, i.e. entertain or have a sentiment or opinion; by implication, to be (mentally) disposed (more or less earnestly in a certain direction); intensively, to interest oneself in (with concern or obedience)
G5426.kjv_def: set the affection on, (be) care(-ful), (be like-, + be of one, + be of the same, + let this) mind(-ed), regard, savour, think

G5403.strongs_def: palm-country; Phœnice (or Phœnicia), a region of Palestine

G5449.strongs_def: growth (by germination or expansion), i.e. (by implication) natural production (lineal descent); by extension, a genus or sort; figuratively, native disposition, constitution or usage

G5410.strongs_def: a forum or market-place; only in comparative with G675 (Ἄππιος); a station on the Appian road

G5494.strongs_def: akin to the base of 5490 through the idea of a channel), meaning a storm (as pouring rain); by implication, the rainy season, i.e. winter

G5424.derivation: probably from an obsolete (to rein in or curb; compare G5420 (φράσσω));
G5424.strongs_def: the midrif (as a partition of the body), i.e. (figuratively and by implication, of sympathy) the feelings (or sensitive nature; by extension (also in the plural) the mind or cognitive faculties)

G5463.strongs_def: to be "cheer"ful, i.e. calmly happy or well-off; impersonally, especially as salutation (on meeting or parting), be well
G5463.kjv_def: farewell, be glad, God speed, greeting, hall, joy(- fully), rejoice
G5463.usage: rejoice(42x), joy(5x), hail(5x), greeting(3x), joyfully(1x), farewell(1x)

G5487.strongs_def: to grace, i.e. indue with special honor

G5416.derivation: neuter of a derivative from the base of G5417 (φραγελλόω);
G5416.strongs_def: a whip, i.e. Roman lash as a public punishment

G5440.derivation: neuter of a derivative of G5442 (φυλάσσω);
G5440.strongs_def: a guard-case, i.e. "phylactery" for wearing slips of Scripture texts

G5400.derivation: neuter of a derivative of G5399 (φοβέω);
G5400.strongs_def: a frightening thing, i.e. terrific portent

G5401.derivation: from a primary (to be put in fear);

G5456.derivation: probably akin to G5316 (φαίνω) through the idea of disclosure;
G5456.strongs_def: a tone (articulate, bestial or artificial); by implication, an address (for any purpose), saying or language

G5461.strongs_def: to shed rays, i.e. to shine or (transitively) to brighten up (literally or figuratively)
G5461.kjv_def: enlighten, illuminate, (bring to, give) light, make to see

G5442.derivation: probably from G5443 (φυλή) through the idea of isolation;
G5442.strongs_def: to watch, i.e. be on guard (literally of figuratively); by implication, to preserve, obey, avoid

G5485.strongs_def: graciousness (as gratifying), of manner or act (abstract or concrete; literal, figurative or spiritual; especially the divine influence upon the heart, and its reflection in the life; including gratitude)
G5485.kjv_def: acceptable, benefit, favour, gift, grace(- ious), joy, liberality, pleasure, thank(-s, -worthy)

G5491.derivation: from a form of the same as G5490 (χάσμα);
G5491.strongs_def: a lip (as a pouring place); figuratively, a margin (of water)

G5417.derivation: from a presumed equivalent of the Latin flagellum;
G5417.strongs_def: to whip, i.e. lash as a public punishment

G5486.strongs_def: a (divine) gratuity, i.e. deliverance (from danger or passion); (specially), a (spiritual) endowment, i.e. (subjectively) religious qualification, or (objectively) miraculous faculty

G5433.strongs_def: to snort (as a spirited horse), i.e. (figuratively) to make a tumult

G5457.derivation: from an obsolete (to shine or make manifest, especially by rays;
G5457.strongs_def: compare G5316 (φαίνω), G5346 (φημί)); luminousness (in the widest application, natural or artificial, abstract or concrete, literal or figurative)

G5468.derivation: from a compound of G5469 (χαλινός) and the reduplicated form of G71 (ἄγω);
G5468.strongs_def: to be a bit-leader, i.e. to curb (figuratively)

G5420.derivation: apparently a strengthening form of the base of G5424 (φρήν);
G5420.strongs_def: to fence or inclose, i.e. (specially), to block up (figuratively, to silence)

G5480.strongs_def: a scratch or etching, i.e. stamp (as a badge of servitude), or scupltured figure (statue)

G5476.derivation: adverb perhaps from the base of G5490 (χάσμα) through the idea of a fissure in the soil;

G5406.strongs_def: a murderer (always of criminal (or at least intentional) homicide; which G443 (ἀνθρωποκτόνος) does not necessarily imply; while G4607 (σικάριος) is a special term for a public bandit)

G5482.strongs_def: akin to G1125 (γράφω) through the idea of scratching); a stake, i.e. (by implication) a palisade or rampart (military mound for circumvallation in a siege)

G5490.derivation: from a form of an obsolete primary (to "gape" or "yawn");

G5478.strongs_def: a Chanaanæan (i.e. Kenaanite), or native of gentile Palestine

G5481.strongs_def: a graver (the tool or the person), i.e. (by implication) engraving (("character"), the figure stamped, i.e. an exact copy or (figuratively) representation)

G5493.derivation: from the base of G5494 (χειμών) and G4482 (ῥέω);

G5434.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of (to roast or parch;
G5434.strongs_def: akin to the base of G5395 (φλόξ)); something desiccated, i.e. a dry twig

G5477.strongs_def: Chanaan (i.e. Kenaan), the early name of Palestine

G5453.strongs_def: probably originally, to "puff" or blow, i.e. to swell up; but only used in the implied sense, to germinate or grow (sprout, produce), literally or figuratively

G5429.strongs_def: thoughtful, i.e. sagacious or discreet (implying a cautious character; while G4680 (σοφός) denotes practical skill or acumen; and G4908 (συνετός) indicates rather intelligence or mental acquirement); in a bad sense conceited (also in the comparative)

G5496.strongs_def: to be a hand-leader, i.e. to guide (a blind person)

G5443.strongs_def: an offshoot, i.e. race or clan

G5419.derivation: probably akin to G5420 (φράσσω) through the idea of defining;
G5419.strongs_def: to indicate (by word or act), i.e. (specially), to expound

G5451.strongs_def: trans-planting, i.e. (concretely) a shrub or vegetable

G5421.strongs_def: a hole in the ground (dug for obtaining or holding water or other purposes), i.e. a cistern or well; figuratively, an abyss (as a prison)

G5492.strongs_def: to storm, i.e. (passively) to labor under a gale

G5474.derivation: neuter of a compound of G5475 (χαλκός) and G3030 (λίβανος) (in the implied mean of whiteness or brilliancy);
G5474.strongs_def: burnished copper, an alloy of copper (or gold) and silver having a brilliant lustre

G5411.strongs_def: a load (as borne), i.e. (figuratively) a tax (properly, an individual assessment on persons or property; whereas G5056 (τέλος) is usually a general toll on goods or travel)

G5484.derivation: accusative case of G5485 (χάρις) as preposition;
G5484.strongs_def: through favor of, i.e. on account of
G5484.kjv_def: be-(for) cause of, for sake of, +…fore, X reproachfully

G5445.derivation: from a prolonged form of (to mix a liquid with a solid;
G5445.strongs_def: perhaps akin to G5453 (φύω) through the idea of swelling in bulk), mean to knead; a mass of dough

G5497.derivation: from G5495 (χείρ) and a reduplicated form of G71 (ἄγω);
G5497.strongs_def: a hand-leader, i.e. personal conductor (of a blind person)
G5497.kjv_def: some to lead by the hand

G5499.derivation: from G5495 (χείρ) and a derivative of G4160 (ποιέω);

G5466.strongs_def: a Chaldæan (i.e. Kasdi), or native or the region of the lower Euphrates

G5498.derivation: neuter of a compound of G5495 (χείρ) and G1125 (γράφω);
G5498.strongs_def: something hand-written ("chirograph"), i.e. a manuscript (specially, a legal document or bond (figuratively))

G5483.strongs_def: to grant as a favor, i.e. gratuitously, in kindness, pardon or rescue

G5418.strongs_def: a fence, or inclosing barrier (literally or figuratively)

G5428.strongs_def: mental action or activity, i.e. intellectual or moral insight

G5438.strongs_def: a guarding or (concretely, guard), the act, the person; figuratively, the place, the condition, or (specially), the time (as a division of day or night), literally or figuratively
G5438.usage: prison(36x), watch(6x), imprisonment(2x), hold(1x), cage(1x), ward(1x)

G5432.derivation: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G3708 (ὁράω);
G5432.strongs_def: to be a watcher in advance, i.e. to mount guard as a sentinel (post spies at gates); figuratively, to hem in, protect

G5467.derivation: perhaps from G5465 (χαλάω) through the idea of reducing the strength;
G5467.strongs_def: difficult, i.e. dangerous, or (by implication) furious

G5489.strongs_def: a sheet ("chart") of writing-material (as to be scribbled over)

G5448.derivation: from G5449 (φύσις) in the primary sense of blowing;

G5422.strongs_def: to be a mind-misleader, i.e. delude

G5469.strongs_def: a curb or head-stall (as curbing the spirit)

G5409.strongs_def: to have a burden, i.e. (by analogy) to wear as clothing or a constant accompaniment

G5452.strongs_def: to set out in the earth, i.e. implant; figuratively, to instil doctrine

G5479.kjv_def: gladness, X greatly, (X be exceeding) joy(-ful, -fully, -fulness, -ous)
G5479.usage: joy(51x), gladness(3x), joyful(1x), joyous(1x), joyfulness(1x), greatly(1x)

G5412.strongs_def: to load up (properly, as a vessel or animal), i.e. (figuratively) to overburden with ceremony (or spiritual anxiety)
